ESOP Ecosystem Outreach Playbook
Advisor Outreach Strategy for {{companyName}}
Company
{{companyName}}
Date
{{generatedDate}}
§ 01Outreach Strategy

ESOP transactions require a specialized team of advisors. This playbook organizes potential advisors into three tiers based on priority and tracks outreach status. Begin outreach with Tier 1 firms and escalate to Tier 2/3 only if Tier 1 is unavailable or a better fit is identified.

Key principle: Outbound outreach should come from Forhemit (the transaction advisor), not the seller. This preserves the seller's negotiating position and ensures consistent messaging.
§ 02Tier 1 — First Choice (Outreach Priority)

These firms are our first-choice recommendations based on ESOP experience, reputation, deal-size fit, and geographic proximity.

Firm Contact Specialty Outreach Status Response
{{tier1Firm1}} {{tier1Contact1}} {{tier1Specialty1}} {{tier1Status1}} {{tier1Response1}}
{{tier1Firm2}} {{tier1Contact2}} {{tier1Specialty2}} {{tier1Status2}} {{tier1Response2}}
{{tier1Firm3}} {{tier1Contact3}} {{tier1Specialty3}} {{tier1Status3}} {{tier1Response3}}
§ 03Tier 2 — Backup Options

Strong alternatives if Tier 1 firms are unavailable, over-booked, or not the right fit for this specific deal.

Firm Contact Specialty Outreach Status Response
{{tier2Firm1}} {{tier2Contact1}} {{tier2Specialty1}} {{tier2Status1}} {{tier2Response1}}
{{tier2Firm2}} {{tier2Contact2}} {{tier2Specialty2}} {{tier2Status2}} {{tier2Response2}}
§ 04Tier 3 — Specialty / Niche

Firms for specific needs: niche industries, unusual deal structures, geographic considerations, or specialized expertise.

Firm Contact Specialty Outreach Status Response
{{tier3Firm1}} {{tier3Contact1}} {{tier3Specialty1}} {{tier3Status1}} {{tier3Response1}}
§ 05Outreach Email Templates

Use the following email templates for initial outreach. Customize the [bracketed] fields before sending.

Subject: ESOP Transaction Opportunity — [Company Name] — Forhemit

Dear [Contact Name],

I am reaching out on behalf of Forhemit Transition Stewardship regarding a new ESOP transaction opportunity for [Company Name], a [industry] company based in [location].

Company snapshot:
- Revenue: [revenue range]
- EBITDA: [EBITDA range]
- Employee count: [number]
- Transaction structure: 100% ESOP, new plan

We believe your firm's expertise in [specific area] would be valuable to this engagement. The transaction is expected to close within [timeline] and we are looking for [role] to join the deal team.

Would you have 20 minutes this week for a brief call to discuss? I can share additional details under NDA.

Best regards,
Forhemit Transition Stewardship
deals@forhemit.com | forhemit.com
Subject: Follow-Up: ESOP Transaction — [Company Name]

Dear [Contact Name],

I wanted to follow up on my previous email regarding the ESOP transaction for [Company Name].

We are finalizing the deal team and would like to understand your availability and interest. If you are unable to take on this engagement, we would appreciate a brief response so we can proceed with alternative arrangements.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Forhemit Transition Stewardship
§ 06Follow-Up Schedule
Day 0Initial outreach email — send to all Tier 1 firms simultaneously
Day 3Follow-up email — if no response, send follow-up template
Day 5Phone call — call main contact directly
Day 7Tier 2 outreach — if Tier 1 firms are unavailable, begin Tier 2 outreach
Day 10Decision deadline — finalize advisor selection
Day 14Engagement letters — send engagement letters to selected advisors
Generated: {{generatedDate}}
